title: Nexus
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: An exploration of how information networks have shaped our world and the existential risks posed by AI.

title: Chip War
author: Chris Miller
description: An essential look at the geopolitical struggle over semiconductor dominance and its impact on global power.

title: Buckeye
author: Patrick Ryan
description: A sweeping novel that weaves together the lives of two Midwestern families across generations.

title: Genesis
author: Eric Schmidt, Craig Mundie, and Henry Kissinger
description: A collaborative work discussing the future of the human spirit and societal structures in an automated age.

title: Becoming Earth
author: Ferris Jabr
description: A scientific narrative exploring how the biological world has shaped the physical planet over eons.

title: Isola
author: Megha Majumdar
description: A historical epic following a 16th-century heroine marooned on an island, fighting for survival.

title: AI Snake Oil
author: Arvind Narayanan and Sayash Kapoor
description: A critical evaluation framework that separates AI hype from actual technological capabilities.

title: Our Moon
author: Rebecca Boyle
description: An investigation into how the moon guided evolution and transformed human history.

title: James
author: Percival Everett
description: A reimagining of Adventures of Huckleberry Finn told from the perspective of Jim.

title: Co-Intelligence
author: Ethan Mollick
description: A practical guide to leveraging generative AI as a partner in creative and professional workflows.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship that teaches how to write better, maintainable code.

title: Breath
author: James Nestor
description: A scientific exploration into the lost art of breathing and its impact on health and performance.

title: Circe
author: Madeline Miller
description: A bold reimagining of the myth of the daughter of Helios who turns her enemies into monsters.

title: Algorithms
author: Panos Louridas
description: An introduction to the essential algorithms that power our digital world and data processing.

title: Helgoland
author: Carlo Rovelli
description: A journey through the birth and meaning of quantum physics from a renowned physicist.
